reviews.review_description: So I’m not one of this guys friends but this game is a w and he really tried on this game and you all need to try this game out so this kid can feel like he did so much s ok please download this game and get you friends to play so this kid can feel special. And if the owner sees this you did a really good job on this game so keep making this game better and I will play this game with my friends as much as I can. Love you man. And marry Christmas ￼

developer_response.body: Thank You for this review it does mean alot as this game was more of a passion project and people actually enjoyed this, Once Again Thank You
